WYATT, ROBT.—B. 1870; Lond. Metro. pol., 1831 to 1895; B. Hond. pol., June, 1895; asst. supt., Feb., 1902; ag. supt., May, 1902, to May, 1903; ag. dist. comsnr., Orange Walk, July to Aug., 1903; ag. dist. comsnr., Corosol, 26th Apr. to 11th July, 1905; ditto, Caye, Feb., 1906; ag. supt. pol., 14th July, 1905; J.P. for Colony; Hythe extra certif., 1899; supt. of pol., 1st Apr., 1906; certif. of proficiency for field offrs. with spec. distinction, schl. of instr., Chelsea barracks, 1907; certif. for management of English convict and local prisons, 1907; attached to London fire brigade for training, 1907.
WYNNE, HON. AGAR.—M.L.C., Victoria, 1889; mem., H. of R., C. of A., 1906-1914; postmaster-gen., C. of A., June, 1913; atty.-gen. and min. of rlyws., Victoria, Nov., 1917.

YOUILL, JOSEPH.—Seconded from Impl. serv. to B. E. Africa and Uganda Prots. as 1st grade dist. survr., 1st Jan., 1913 to 17th Dec., 1915; seconded to G. Coast, 31st May, 1916; offr.-in-charge, post and telegraph dept., Togoland, 22nd May, 1918 to 23rd Jan., 1919, and from 12th Aug., 1919.

YOUNG, ALFRED KARNET.—K.C., B.A., Magd. Coll., Oxon.; called to the bar, In.Tem., May, 1889; 2nd clk., col. sec.'s office, Br. Honduras, Oct., 1890; ag. dist. mag., Toledo dist., Aug., 1891; priv. sec. to Sir A. Maloney, and clk. of councils, 1892; priv. sec. to admnstr. of the govt., 1895; ag. regist.-gen., 1895-7; dist. comsnr., Orange Walk, 1898; regist.-gen., June, 1898; ag. supt. of police, May to Nov., 1899; J.P. for col.; crown prosecutor, legal adviser, and police mag., Seychelles, 23rd Sept., 1903; atty.-gen., B.C. Africa Prot., 17th Mar., 1906; stip. mag., Trinidad, 1908; ch. just., Seychelles, Aug., 1909; admnstd. govt., Apr. to Nov., 1911, and from 16th to 27th Dec., 1912; atty.-gen., Fiji, May, 1914; ag. chief just., Jan., 1915.

YOUNG, CAPT. SIR ARTHUR HENDERSON, G.C.M.G. (1916); K.C.M.G. (1908); K.B.E. (1913); C.M.G. (1897).—B. 1854; late 27th Inniskillings; ed. at Edin. Acad., Rugby, and Sandhurst; local comdt., mil. pol., Kyrenia, Aug., 1878; asst. comsnr., Paphos, Nov., 1878; comsnr., Paphos, Sept., 1879; ditto, Famagusta, Jan., 1882; dir. of survey and prin. forest offr., 1892; mem. legis. coun., 1892; ch. sec., 1894; admnstd. the govt., July to Dec., 1895, Jan. to Apr., 1898; sent on special mission to St. Vincent in connctn. with relief work, Nov., 1902; col. sec., S. Sttlmsts., June, 1906; admnstd. govt., Feb. to May, 1909; ch. sec., F.M.S., 1910; gov., S. Sttlmsts., 8th Aug., 1911; assumed govt., 2nd Sept., 1911; also high comsnr. for Malay States and for Brunei and Brit. Agt. for N. Borneo and Sarawak; ret. 25th Nov., 1919.

YOUNG, HON. SIR FREDRICK WILLIAM, KT. BACH.(1913), LL.B.—M.H.A., S. Australia, 1909; comsnr. of crown lands and immigr., 1912-14; agt.-gen. for S. Australia, 1915-18; mem. of comtee. for sttlm. of ex-service men within the Empire, 1917; M.P. (Co. U.), Swindon, 1918.

YOUNG, HENRY ALFRED, K.C.—Ed. at Derby Schl. and Edin. Univ.; called to the bar (Scotland), July, 1899; asst. crown advocate, E. Africa Prot., 22nd June, 1906; asst. atty.-gen., 1913; res. mag., 1917.

YOUNG, MARK AITCHISON.—B. 1886; ed. Eton and King's Coll., Camb. (B.A.); cadet, Ceylon civ. ser., Nov., 1909; off. ast. to govt. agt., N. Prov., Aug., 1910; ditto, Kandy, Nov., 1911; ag. asst. govt. agt., Mullaitivu, Jan., 1913; 4th ast. col. sec., Nov., 1913; ag. 3rd ditto, Feb., 1914; 2nd ditto and clk. of leg. coun., Sep., 1914; 3rd ast. col. sec., Oct., 1914; on mil. duty, 1915.

YOUNG, ROBT. HEYDEN.—B. 1858; sub-survr., survey dept., S. Sttlmsts., 28th Jan., 1878; computer and drafterman, Malacca, 1st May, 1881; dist. survr., Oct., 1882; ch. survr., 12th July, 1888; senior survr., Jan., 1891; senior survr. and supervisor of survey schl., 1902; suptgd. re-survey of Singapore, 4th May, 1903; senior survey offr., Dec., 1903, but cont. to act as supt. of re-survey and supervisor of survey schl.

YOUNG, SIR WILLIAM DOUGLAS, K.B.E.(1919); C.M.G. (1907).—Ed. at Charterhouse; clk. in govt. sec.'s office, Br. Guiana, Jan., 1877; ch. clk., 1889; ag. priv. sec. on several occasions, 1877-1893, to govrs. of Br. Guiana, Trinidad, and G. Coast; ag. asst. govt. sec., Br. Guiana, 1892-3-4-5; ag. govt. sec., Dec., 1892; ag. govt. agt. N.W. dist., 1893; ast. col. sec., Mauritius, 1895; ag. col. sec., 1896-7-8, 1900-01; admnstd. govt., Mauritius, Aug., 1897; comsnr., Turks and Caicos Islands, 1901; admnstr., Dominica, 19th Apr., 1906; ag. govr., Leeward Is., 1909; admnstr., St. Lucia, 1913; ag. govr., Windward Is., May to Dec., 1914; gov., Falkland Is., 28th Dec., 1914; assumed govt., 15th May, 1915.
